questions.explanation: Michael Faraday discovered electromagnetic induction in 1831.

questions.text: Lenz's law is based on the conservation of energy.
questions.explanation: Lenz's law (the induced emf opposes the change in flux) is based on conservation of energy.

questions.text: The SI unit of magnetic flux is ________.
questions.explanation: Magnetic flux (Φ) is measured in Weber (Wb). 1 Wb = 1 T·m²

questions.text: State Faraday's law of electromagnetic induction.
questions.correctAnswer: The magnitude of induced emf is equal to the rate of change of magnetic flux. ε = -dΦ/dt
questions.explanation: Faraday's law: The induced emf is proportional to the rate of change of magnetic flux through the circuit.
